calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sepa Wongsee is present.
Attorney Robert Chang representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweitzer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-3-2011 is vacated.
